creator: list1@gjunka.com
text:
(In reply to Marcus von Appen from comment #1)

Why do you think it's related to ImageMagick/libglapi? As far as I could check the missing file alsoft-config supposed to be provided by openal-soft?

This is a poudriere build, so if you take the options I attached and try to build openal-soft with the testport option you should be able to reproduce it quite easily. I guess it's related to some options that have been checked either in openal-soft or other port and not to my environment. Especially that the build is in poudriere which is somehow isolated from the environment.

But I can provide any information you need, what exactly you need to know about the environment?
